message:
feat(conformance): expand CLIENT, connection, and hash command fixture coverage

core_client.json (+152 lines):
- CLIENT ID: returns integer, wrong arity rejection
- CLIENT SETNAME/GETNAME: round-trip verification for list test setup
- CLIENT NO-EVICT, NO-TOUCH, REPLY: wrong arity error cases
- CLIENT NO-TOUCH: invalid argument (not 'on'/'off') error
- CLIENT UNPAUSE: wrong arity rejection
- CLIENT PAUSE: invalid timeout, WRITE mode, ALL mode
- CLIENT CACHING: wrong arity, CACHING NO returns OK
- CLIENT TRACKING OFF: returns OK
- CLIENT KILL ADDR: returns 0 for non-existent address
- RESET: clears client name (SETNAME -> RESET -> GETNAME null cycle)

core_connection.json (+179 lines):
- HELLO: RESP2 and RESP3 protocol negotiation with full map response
- HELLO: unsupported version 4, version 1 rejection (NOPROTO errors)
- HELLO: wrong arity (no args)
- QUIT: returns OK
- READONLY/READWRITE: returns OK
- SELECT: valid db 0 and 1, negative db and out-of-range db 16 errors
- FLUSHALL: basic OK, ASYNC mode, verify data actually cleared cycle
- DBSIZE: returns 0 after FLUSHALL
- TIME: large millisecond timestamp decomposition into seconds+microseconds
- RANDOMKEY: wrong arity rejection
- ECHO: binary-safe string round-trip
- PING: binary message variant

core_hash.json (+294 lines):
- HEXISTS/HSTRLEN/HMGET on missing keys (zero/null returns)
- HDEL: multi-field delete (partial match), HLEN verification, missing key
- HGETALL: setup + ordered key-value pair response
- HVALS: returns sorted value list
- HRANDFIELD: single-element hash, missing key null, positive/zero/negative
  count, WITHVALUES modifier, missing key with count
- HSCAN: full scan, missing key, MATCH pattern filter
- HINCRBY: negative increment, missing key auto-init
- HINCRBYFLOAT: missing key auto-init with float
- Arity errors for HSET, HGET, HDEL, HMGET, HRANDFIELD

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
